title: Daily Bias Notification System - Fish x TTrades (ICT Concepts)
author: lilfish06
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Daily Bias Notification System - Fish x TTrades (ICT Concepts) by lilfish06.
# Daily Bias — Publication Description --- **Daily Bias** A clean, minimal indicator that tells you today's directional bias based on the previous candle's close relative to the prior candle's range.
**What you see:** - A small **▲** (green), **▼** (red), or **●** (gray) marker on each day.
- A status badge in the top-right: shows the bias and updates its label based on your selected timeframe ("DAILY BIAS", "4H BIAS", "WEEKLY BIAS", etc.) - Nothing else.
